message:
chore(deps): update lz4_flex 0.11.5→0.11.6 and rustls-webpki 0.103.9→0.103.10

Fixes two security vulnerabilities:
- RUSTSEC-2026-0041 (HIGH): lz4_flex could leak uninitialized memory
  when decompressing invalid data. Also yanked from crates.io.
- RUSTSEC-2026-0049: rustls-webpki CRL Distribution Point matching
  logic flaw.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4411,9 +4411,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "lz4_flex"
-version = "0.11.5"
+version = "0.11.6"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "08ab2867e3eeeca90e844d1940eab391c9dc5228783db2ed999acbc0a9ed375a"
+checksum = "373f5eceeeab7925e0c1098212f2fbc4d416adec9d35051a6ab251e824c1854a"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "lzma-rust2"
@@ -6039,9 +6039,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "rustls-webpki"
-version = "0.103.9"
+version = "0.103.10"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "d7df23109aa6c1567d1c575b9952556388da57401e4ace1d15f79eedad0d8f53"
+checksum = "df33b2b81ac578cabaf06b89b0631153a3f416b0a886e8a7a1707fb51abbd1ef"
 dependencies = [
  "ring",
  "rustls-pki-types",
